description_long: This object is a medieval-style sword with a long, straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is primarily metallic silver with visible red stains or markings along its length, suggesting either decorative elements or simulated blood. The crossguard is gold-colored and curves slightly upward, providing hand protection and a visual accent. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a dark, textured material for grip, and capped with a rounded, gold pommel. The overall design is functional yet ornate, suitable for display or ceremonial use as well as combat. The sword's proportions and details evoke a sense of historical craftsmanship and durability.
description: A medieval-style sword with a straight, double-edged silver blade, gold crossguard and pommel, and a dark wrapped handle with red markings on the blade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the silver blade with red markings, gold crossguard, and dark handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and the gold crossguard's thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the blade's length, red markings, and handle details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slimness of the blade and the gold crossguard from the other side.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, dark wrapped grip, rounded gold pommel
